overall.description: A third-person game scene following a female character in a long dark red dress walking along a foggy coastal path. The environment features rocky cliffs, tall grass, and wooden fencing transitioning to an open beach with a large shipwreck, rendered with atmospheric purple fog and cinematic lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the left, with weathered wooden fence posts on the right. Tall dry grass lines the path and distant figures are barely visible through the heavy purple fog. A bird flies overhead as the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grassland transitioning to beach

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the foggy sky in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path as the cliff recedes and landscape opens up

entered.detail: large wrecked ship hull visible through the fog on the beach ahead

segments.scene_description: The path widens as the rocky cliff recedes into the distance and the wooden fencing disappears. The landscape opens into coastal grassland with a large shipwreck becoming visible through the fog ahead. A sudden lightning strike illuminates the sky at 37 seconds as the character continues toward the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy beach with shipwreck and coastal rocks

agents.ego_description: approaching the large shipwreck on the foggy beach, navigating around driftwood

entered.detail: wet sandy beach surface replacing the dirt trail
calm ocean water visible beyond the beach through the fog
scattered wooden debris and rocks on the beach surface
rock formations along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the beach where the dirt trail gives way to wet sand scattered with driftwood. The massive shipwreck looms larger as the camera approaches, with coastal rocks and calm water visible to the right. The rocky cliff remains visible far to the left as the fog persists over the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed cliffside trail that gradually opens into a vast, fog-shrouded beach. It begins by trailing a character in a red dress along a dirt path hugged by a rocky cliff and weathered wooden fence posts, with a bird flying overhead through heavy purple fog. As the path widens and the fencing disappears, the landscape expands into coastal grasslands where a large shipwreck emerges from the haze and a sudden lightning strike illuminates the sky. The scene then shifts as the dirt trail gives way to wet sand and driftwood, bringing the camera closer to the looming shipwreck. Finally, the movement settles on the shoreline, with calm water and coastal rocks to the right while the distant cliffs remain visible through the persisting fog.
